allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const t=fs.readFileSync\('modules/modules.jsonl','utf8'\);try{const j=JSON.parse\(t\);console.log\('SINGLE JSON OK. top type:',Array.isArray\(j\)?'array len '+j.length:typeof j, Object.keys\(j\).slice\(0,10\)\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('Not single JSON:',e.message.slice\(0,80\)\);const lines=t.split\(/\\r?\\n/\);console.log\('lines:',lines.length\);let ok=0,bad=0;for\(const l of lines\){if\(!l.trim\(\)\)continue;try{JSON.parse\(l\);ok++}catch{bad++}}console.log\('per-line parse ok:',ok,'bad:',bad\);}")
Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('trade/trade_quarter.jsonl',encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\(type\(d\)\); print\(list\(d.keys\(\)\)[:10] if isinstance\(d,dict\) else len\(d\)\)")

PowerShell("=== package.json in Testing-Project? ==="; Test-Path "package.json"; "=== look for real React app \(package.json\) up/around ==="; Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\nqachibaia\\Desktop" -Filter package.json -Recurse -Depth 3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName -First 20 | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String; "=== what serves 3002 \(process\) ==="; $p = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 3002 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Select-Object -First 1; if \($p\) { Get-Process -Id $p | Select-Object Id,ProcessName,Path | Format-List | Out-String; "cmdline:"; \(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$p"\).CommandLine })
